questionText: Provide your base year and base year emissions.
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: A meaningful and consistent comparison of emissions over time requires that organizations set a performance datum with which to compare current emissions.

guidance.text:
General 
This question requests a base year for your greenhouse gas inventory. This may be the same as the base year for your targets, but not necessarily.
If your company has measured its emissions in the past, you can use the oldest year for which it has available emissions information - preferably verified or assured - as your base year. If your company is measuring its emissions for the first time, choose the current reporting year as the base year.
Companies should ensure that the base year inventory includes both a location-based and market-based Scope 2 total, if applicable and feasible. This ensures "like with like" comparisons over time. If the Scope 2 base year chosen was calculated only according to the location-based method, you should also recalculate and report a market-based total if contractual information or residual mix totals are available for the base year. If not, you should state in the comment field that the location-based result has been used as a proxy since a market-based figure cannot be calculated.
As per the GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Accounting and Reporting Standard , companies should use a single base year for Scope 1, Scope 2, and Scope 3 emissions (for all calculated Scope 3 categories). This is to enable comprehensive and consistent tracking of total emissions across all three Scopes over time. However, companies with already established base years for Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions may use a more recent year for the Scope 3 base year (e.g., the first year for which you have complete and reliable Scope 3 emissions data).
Establishing a single base year for all Scope 3 categories simplifies Scope 3 emissions tracking and allows clearer communication of GHG emissions to data users.
If you are using an average of annual emissions over several consecutive years for your base year emissions, enter the last date in the period, then provide the time period over which the average was calculated in column 4 and explain that the emissions figure reported is an average.
If you have not calculated base year emissions for a particular Scope 3 category, leave the respective row blank.
The "Scope 2 (market based)" row only appears if you select "We are reporting a Scope 2, market-based figure" in column "Scope 2, market-based" of 7.3.
Base year end (column 1) 
The start date will be automatically assumed to be exactly 365 days before the listed date. For example, if you enter an end date of 31/12/2023, your start date will be automatically assumed to be 01/01/2023.
Methodological details (column 3) 
Include at least the measurement approach, emissions factors, inputs, and assumptions used to measure your emissions, and a rationale for your choices.
Note for financial services sector companies: 
For financial services sector companies responding to the full version of the questionnaire, Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" emissions has been pulled out of question 7.5 and is requested to be disclosed in 12.1.1. As the majority of emissions occur in relation to financial products and services and/or investments, financed emissions, or Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" emissions as defined by the GHG Protocol is the most relevant category to financial services organizations.
Thus, Row 15 "Investments" is hidden in this question, and this information should be disclosed in 12.1.1 instead
guidance.textKo: 일반 This 문항 requests a 기준연도 귀사의 greenhouse gas inventory. This may be the same as the 기준연도 귀사의 목표, but not necessarily. 만약 your company has measured its emissions in the past, you can use the oldest year for which it has available emissions information - preferably verified 또는 assured - as your 기준연도. 만약 your company is measuring its emissions 에 대한 first time, choose the current 보고연도 as the 기준연도. Companies 해야 합니다 ensure that the 기준연도 inventory includes both a 지역기반 및 시장기반 Scope 2 total, 만약 해당되는 경우 및 feasible. This ensures "like with like" comparisons over time. 만약 the Scope 2 기준연도 chosen was calculated only according to the 지역기반 method, you 해야 합니다 also recalculate 및 report a 시장기반 total 만약 contractual information 또는 residual mix totals are available 에 대한 기준연도. 만약 not, you 해야 합니다 state in the comment field that the 지역기반 result has been used as a proxy since a 시장기반 figure cannot be calculated. As per the GHG Protocol Corporate 가치사슬 (Scope 3) Accounting 및 Reporting Standard, companies 해야 합니다 use a single 기준연도 for Scope 1, Scope 2, 및 Scope 3 배출량 (for all calculated Scope 3 categories). This is to enable comprehensive 및 consistent tracking of total emissions across all three Scopes over time. However, companies with already established 기준연도s for Scope 1 및 Scope 2 배출량 may use a more recent year 에 대한 Scope 3 기준연도 (e.g., the first year for which you have complete 및 reliable Scope 3 배출량 data). Establishing a single 기준연도 for all Scope 3 categories simplifies Scope 3 배출량 tracking 및 allows clearer communication of 온실가스 배출량 to 데이터 사용자. 만약 you are using an average of annual emissions over several consecutive years 귀사의 기준연도 emissions, enter the last date in the period, then provide the time period over which the average was calculated in 열 4 및 explain that the emissions figure 보고 is an average. 만약 you have not calculated 기준연도 emissions for a particular Scope 3 category, leave the respective 행 blank. The "Scope 2 (market based)" 행 only appears 만약 you select "We are reporting a Scope 2, 시장기반 figure" in 열 "Scope 2, 시장기반" of 7.3. 기준연도 end (열 1) The start date will be automatically assumed to be exactly 365 days before the listed date. For example, 만약 you enter an end date of 31/12/2023, your start date will be automatically assumed to be 01/01/2023. 산정방법론 세부사항 (열 3) Include 최소 the measurement approach, emissions factors, inputs, 및 assumptions used to measure your emissions, 및 a rationale 귀사의 choices. Note for 금융 서비스 sector companies: For 금융 서비스 sector companies responding to the full version 의 질문서, Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" emissions has been pulled out of 문항 7.5 및 is requested to be 공개 in 12.1.1. As the majority of emissions occur in relation to financial 제품 및 서비스 및/또는 investments, 금융배출량, 또는 Scope 3 Category 15 "Investments" emissions as defined by the GHG Protocol is the most 관련 category to 금융 서비스 organizations. Thus, 행 15 "Investments" is hidden in this 문항, 및 this information 해야 합니다 be 공개 in 12.1.1 instead

guidance.text:
Setting a base year:  Setting a base year is an essential GHG accounting step that a company must take to be able to observe trends in its emissions information. According to the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard, a base year is "a historic datum (a specific year or an average over multiple years) against which a company's emissions are tracked over time." See Chapter 5 of the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard for more information on setting and recalculating a base year.
Recalculation criteria for Scope 3 emissions base year:  Table 9.5 (p.105) from the  Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Accounting and Reporting Standard  provides additional guidance for determining the need for Scope 3 base year recalculation due to changes in insourcing/outsourcing.
guidance.textKo: Setting a 기준연도: Setting a 기준연도 is an essential GHG accounting step that a company 해야 합니다 take to be able to observe trends in its emissions information. According to the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard, a 기준연도 is "a historic datum (a specific year 또는 an average over multiple years) against which a company's emissions are tracked over time." See Chapter 5 의 GHG Protocol Corporate Standard for more information on setting 및 recalculating a 기준연도. Re계산 기준 for Scope 3 배출량 기준연도: Table 9.5 (p.105) from the Corporate 가치사슬 (Scope 3) Accounting 및 Reporting Standard provides additional guidance for determining the need for Scope 3 기준연도 re계산 due to changes in insourcing/outsourcing.

guidance.text: Companies disclose that their Scope 1 emissions in the reporting year have reduced in line with a 1.5 °C-aligned pathway.
guidance.textKo: Companies disclose that their Scope 1 배출량 in the 보고연도 have reduced in line with a 1.5 °C-aligned pathway.

criteria.criteria:
i) Row 'Scope 1' completed - 1 point
ii) Either row 'Scope 2 (location-based)' OR 'Scope 2 (market-based)' completed - 1 point
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.

change.question_ko: 기준 연도 및 기준 연도 배출량을 입력하십시오 . ` M7. Environmental Performance - Climate Change Scope 기준연도 기준연도 배출량 방법론 상세 별도 행으로 Scope 마다 작성 Scope 1 Scope 2 Scope 3 C1~C15 카테고리별로 작성 DD/MM/YYYY 숫자 입력 소수점 이하 최대 3 자리 사용 최대 2,500 자 작성

sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: A meaningful 및 consistent comparison of emissions over time requires that organizations set a performance datum with which to compare current emissions.
